case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. WAYNE LANCHESTER et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: settlement conference held. present: Arnold Walter Evje, Esq. for pltf and pro per deft. settled off the record: restitution of 909 Geary st. #511, agreement forfeited, stayed to 11-15-02 @5 pm. pltf receives nothing in back rent. If deft does not vacate, pltf will have judgt for unpaid back rent of $690, ud damages of $15.33 per day from 10-1-02 thru 11-15-02, $191 costs, no atty fees- total $1,586.18 each party waives any claim. judge pro temp: larry becker;clerk, t.maruyama. (dept. 218)
